title: session-experience-envelope-v1
description: Declarative, dual-purpose contract describing intended player experience bands and budgets over a session, consumable both by LLMs (as a generation target) and by runtime systems (as enforcement input).

schemaFamily.description: Family discriminator used by CHAT_DIRECTOR and AI authoring tools for routing and narrowing.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version for this schema family, e.g. 1.0.0.

sessionId.description: Stable identifier for this authored session or arc. This is not a runtime instance ID; it is the design-time contract ID.

sessionLabel.description: Human-oriented name or label for this session (non-enforced metadata).

sessionKind.description: High-level classification driving default band assumptions and analysis buckets.

phase.description: Lifecycle phase in the CHAT_DIRECTOR model (0=Schema, 1=Registry, 2=Bundles, 3=LuaPolicy, 4=Adapters). For authored envelopes, this will typically be 2 (Bundles).

tier.description: Target safety/stability tier; determines allowed metric bands and enforcement strictness.

aiProfileRef.description: Optional reference to an ai-safe-authoring-profile-v1 document governing this envelope.

authoringContractRef.description: Optional reference to the ai-safe-authoring-contract-v1 under which this envelope was authored.

schemaSpineRef.description: Pointer into the schema spine index that describes the invariants/metrics grammar this envelope is written against.

capabilitySpineRef.description: Pointer into a capability-spine document describing which APIs/tools are available to the runtime director for this session.

discoveryContractRef.description: Optional reference to a discovery-contract-v1 that introduced or negotiated this envelope.

deadledgerRef.description: Opaque reference to a Dead-Ledger proof envelope attesting to the session contract where required (e.g., high-intensity bands at mature tier).

windowUnit.description: Semantic label for one experience window.

windowDurationMinutes.description: Expected real-time duration per window, used for normalization of per-minute budgets.

maxSessionDurationMinutes.description: Upper bound on total session duration assumed when budgeting metrics (used in offline analysis).

timeModel.description: How the session is partitioned into windows that experienceWindows indexes over.

experienceWindows.description: Ordered list of windows describing the intended entertainment metric bands for each segment of the session.

metricBudgets.description: Global budget constraints for each entertainment metric over the entire session (e.g., max time above a threshold).

invariantContext.description: Declarative summary of the canonical invariant environment this session is designed for, used to bind envelopes to region/seed contracts.

pacingContractRef.description: Optional reference to a pacing-contract that refines event densities and DET rhythms compatible with this envelope.

pacingInline.description: Optional embedded pacing hints for systems that do not support a full external pacing-contract-v1.

runtimeHints.description: Machine-readable hints consumed by CHAT_DIRECTOR or engine adapters to interpret this envelope at runtime.

llmGuidance.description: Structured guidance to LLMs describing how generated seeds/events/personas should relate to the envelope bands.

telemetryHooks.description: Configuration of telemetry sources and metrics that will be used to evaluate compliance with this envelope.

provenance.description: Minimal provenance metadata for audit and replay.

band01.description: Closed interval [min, max] on [0,1] for normalized metrics.

bandDet.description: Closed interval [min, max] on [0,10] for DET and other 0–10 invariants.

windowId.description: Short, stable identifier for an experience window.

index.description: Zero-based index in experienceWindows; used by runtime to align with timeline segments.

label.description: Human-readable description of this window’s intended experience (e.g., 'slow build', 'rupture', 'denouement').

tileClassHints.description: Optional hints about dominant tileClasses expected in this window, informing region/seed selection.

regionContractRefs.description: Optional references to regionContractCard artifacts that primarily realize this window.

seedContractRefs.description: Optional references to seedContractCard artifacts that are intended to execute within this window.

uecBand.description: Target UEC band for this window.

emdBand.description: Target EMD band for this window.

stciBand.description: Target STCI band for this window.

cdlBand.description: Target CDL band for this window.

arrBand.description: Target ARR band for this window.

detBand.description: Optional DET band for this window, used for consistency with contract cards and pacing constraints.

maxCdlAboveTargetMinutes.description: Budget for total minutes in this window where CDL may exceed cdlBand.max before being considered a violation.

maxOverwhelmMinutes.description: Budget for minutes where any metric exceeds its window band max by a policy-defined margin.

notes.description: Optional design notes; not interpreted by runtime.

experienceWindow.description: Per-window target bands and local budgets for entertainment metrics.

metric.description: Metric this budget entry applies to.

threshold.description: Normalized threshold in [0,1] considered 'high' for this budget.

maxTimeAbove.description: Maximum total minutes over the entire session that this metric may exceed threshold.

metricBudgetEntry.description: Global budget constraint for a single entertainment metric.

metricBudgets.description: Optional global metric budgets; empty or omitted means use policy defaults from ai-safe-authoring-profile.

invariantBand01.description: Canonical band for invariants that live in [0,1].

defaultBands.description: Canonical invariant bands expected for the majority of regions/seeds in this session; derived from spine for Tier/tileClass.

detBandGlobal.description: Global DET band this session is expected to inhabit; window-level detBand must narrow within this.

archetypeHints.description: Optional freeform hints mapping this session to archetypes defined in the invariants spine (e.g., 'industrial corridor', 'liminal backrooms').

policyEnvelopeRef.description: Optional policyEnvelope reference whose ranges this envelope must stay within; used to enforce narrowing (no widening) rules.

invariantContext.description: Bindings to the invariant spine and policies that contextualize this envelope.

targetEventsPerMinuteBand.description: Soft band for target events per minute over the whole session.

maxHighDetEventsPer10Min.description: Hard cap on high-DET events per 10 minutes across the session.

rhythmPatternIds.description: Optional IDs mapping to pacing templates (slow-burn, rupture, etc.) from the spine.

pacingInline.description: Lightweight pacing constraints for runtimes that do not support full pacing-contract objects.

enforcementMode.description: Controls whether runtime should treat band violations as hard errors, warnings, or telemetry-only.

adaptationStrategy.description: Preferred strategy the runtime director should use when metrics drift from envelope bands.

llmRuntimeRole.description: Role the LLM is expected to play when generating content under this envelope; used to bind against authoring session roles.

runtimeHints.description: Hints used by CHAT_DIRECTOR and engine adapters to operationalize this envelope during a live session.

targetObjectKinds.description: Contract families the LLM is expected to generate in service of this envelope.

generationObjectives.description: High-level instructions for LLM generation (e.g., 'keep UEC within window bands', 'avoid long CDL spikes').

metricPriorityWeights.description: Relative weights indicating which metrics the LLM should prioritize when resolving trade-offs while staying within bands.

llmGuidance.description: Explicit, structured guidance that allows an LLM to treat this envelope as a concrete optimization target instead of vague prose.

sessionMetricsStreamId.description: Identifier for the NDJSON or telemetry stream carrying per-tick/session metrics (UEC, EMD, STCI, CDL, ARR) used to validate this envelope.

windowAssignmentSignal.description: Name of the telemetry field or derived signal that assigns runtime samples to experienceWindows[index].

violationCodes.description: Canonical error/diagnostic codes emitted by analysis tools when this envelope is violated.

telemetryHooks.description: How runtime/analysis telemetry is wired back into this contract for empirical validation.

createdBy.description: Agent or tool that created this envelope (AI or human).

lastModifiedBy.description: Agent or tool that last modified this envelope.

lastModifiedAt.description: Last modification timestamp in RFC 3339 format.

requestId.description: Optional ai-authoring-request-v1 identifier that produced this envelope.

provenance.description: Minimal provenance data aligning this envelope with ai-authoring and Dead-Ledger audit trails.
